data.interface_name: According to SN Set discharge information
data.interface_content:
##### Description

- According to SN Set discharge information，Setting frequency 24 hours, set once a day

##### Request URL
- ` https://openapi.alphaess.com/api/updateDisChargeConfigInfo `
  
##### Request Type
- POST
##### Headers Parameter

|Fields|Requires|Type|Description|
|:----    |:---|:----- |-----   |
|appId |Yes |string |AppID   |
|timeStamp |Yes |long| Unix timestamp is used to confirm validity of your request. If the timespan between request timestamp and server timestamp exceeds 300 seconds, then the request will be rejected.How to calculate the unix timestamp?(DateTime.UtcNow-new DateTime(1970,1,1)).TotalSeconds，For example，2022-12-20 10:54:06（Beijing Time） ，this timestamp is 1671507191，url：https://tool.lu/timestamp/|
|sign     |Yes  |string | appId+appSecret+timeStamp，then use Sha512 Encryption 。For example：appId：alphaef7900ee81dbbce9，appSecret：c2d2ef6c047c49678e2c332fb2d74c3c，timeStamp：1676353875，before encryption：alphaef7900ee81dbbce9c2d2ef6c047c49678e2c332fb2d74c3c1676353875，SHA512after encryption：0f023c2287b8f6b21b0994947465f8e9de0e1542567b1735bdc6c427336b9b6406285cd94f9215c3e9af958df37fb11c2c9fe792713d8afbdb8c463359a1add8  |
##### Request Parameter

|Fields|Requires|Type|Description|
|:----    |:---|:----- |-----   |
|batUseCap |Yes|decimal| Discharging Cutoff SOC [%]
|ctrDis|int |Yes| Enable Battery Discharge Time Control
|timeDise1 |Yes|string|Discharging Period 1 End time, the time format is HH:mm, such as: 00:00, the maximum is 23:45, the minimum is 00:00, and the interval is 15 minutes, such as: 00:15, 00:30, 00:45, otherwise no effect
|timeDise2 |Yes|string|Discharging Period 2 End time, the time format is HH:mm, such as: 00:00, the maximum is 23:45, the minimum is 00:00, and the interval is 15 minutes, such as: 00:15, 00:30, 00:45, otherwise no effect
|timeDisf1 |Yes|string|Discharging Period 1 Start time, the time format is HH:mm, such as: 00:00, the maximum is 23:45, the minimum is 00:00, and the interval is 15 minutes, such as: 00:15, 00:30, 00:45, otherwise no effect
|timeDisf2 |Yes|string|Discharging Period 2 Start time, the time format is HH:mm, such as: 00:00, the maximum is 23:45, the minimum is 00:00, and the interval is 15 minutes, such as: 00:15, 00:30, 00:45, otherwise no effect
|sysSn   |Yes  |string | System S/N  |
##### Response Parameter

|Fields|Type|Description|
|:----    |:----|:----- |-----   |
|code|int   |Return Code |
|msg|string   |Return Message|
|data|data  |Return Data|
